source.scope: Official-source-backed Luxembourg 2026 resident ordinary assessment under tax classes 1, 1a and 2.

LU.notes: Resident ordinary assessment using the Article 118 tariff, class 1a transformation and caps, class 2 splitting, statutory rounding and employment-fund contribution. Income derivation, eligibility and category-specific credits remain outside scope.

register.coverageSummary: 2026 resident ordinary income tax for tax classes 1, 1a and 2 plus the employment-fund contribution.
